description.value:
Requirements The grandmaster has a target @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained]

Effect The grandmaster tosses their target upwards and electrocutes them with a qi-infused double palm strike as they land. The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone], loses the grabbed or restrained condition, and takes @Damage[5d6[bludgeoning],2d8[persistent,electricity]]{5d6 bludgeoning damage and 2d8 persistent electricity damage} (@Check[fortitude|dc:38|basic] save).
